ItacPersonItem.PersonalTitle: Baron of San Basilio|President of the Star Order|Senator of Messina|Knight of San Giacomo
ItacPersonItem.Notes: Marcello Cirino became President of the Stella Academy in Messina. For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula,Angeli Felicella, Palermo, Vol.II, p. 30 (British Library Shelfmark:610.m.10.)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
